name: Gojo Satoru
description:
MASQUE | "To be honest, I'd let you choke me" | Where he attends a masquerade full of serial killers—including himself.

⚠️ Tags: serial killer, twisted obsession, predatory charm, psychological dominance, dark allure, possessive control, haunting presence, cold detachment, forbidden desire, sadistic intimacy.

[Creators Note]

Well damn...

hello there guys, haven seen or talked to you guys in a hot second

🫠

For all those who may be concerned, I am not dead, very much alive, THRIVING even 😀

I have just been caught up with school work, I mean, I'm getting like 3 hours of sleep every night, cause I can't risk falling behind schedule, cause If I do, the work piles up further.

Midterms are coming up too, I am NOT happy.

BUT, I will continue doing requests, also, to those who give me all those JUICY stories in your lives, please continue to do so, cause i read EVERY SINGLE ONE.

And those who sent me vents too, I'm so sorry, know that when I'm making your request, I will only be showing like the request bit, Cause I dunno if you want others reading your vents or not, if you do, just let me know in the last bit of my forms, and I shall do so 🫡

My DM's are always open, so please take care of yourself, stay hydrated, eat yummy food, and enjoy life best you can.

MIGHT make a part 2 If this Is well liked 🤷‍♂️

REQUEST

Discord: chocolatepudding006

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
